# YouOweMe

> Official website for YouOweMe, an iOS loan tracker and IOU app for tracking money owed, shared expenses, repayments, and money conversations.

Use the pages below as the canonical source for product information, feature descriptions, and blog guidance about money tracking and money communication.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://you-owe-me.com/): Main product page for YouOweMe, including product overview, features, FAQ, and App Store download link.
- [Solutions](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/): Use-case hub for shared expenses, money owed, couples, family reimbursements, roommates, and repayment follow-ups.
- [Shared Expense Tracker](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/shared-expense-tracker/): Product page for tracking shared expenses, split bills, recurring costs, and running balances across friends, couples, roommates, and families.
- [App to Track Money Owed](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/app-to-track-money-owed/): Product page for tracking personal IOUs, money owed, partial repayments, reminders, and follow-up messages.
- [Expense Tracker for Couples](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/expense-tracker-for-couples/): Product page for couples tracking shared spending, flexible splits, recurring costs, repayments, and calmer money follow-ups.
- [Blog](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/): Blog hub for guides about asking for money, repayments, shared expenses, and tracking who owes whom.
- [Privacy Policy](https://you-owe-me.com/privacy-policy/): Current privacy policy for the YouOweMe iOS app.

## Articles

- [How to Handle Awkward Money Conversations: Ask, Follow Up, and Repay Clearly](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-handle-awkward-money-conversations/): Guide to asking for money, following up on unpaid balances, and sending repayment updates clearly.
- [How to Track Shared Expenses Without Constantly Reconciling Every Transaction](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-track-shared-expenses-without-constantly-reconciling-every-transaction/): Guide to keeping a running balance for shared expenses without constant recalculation.
- [How to Politely Say No When People Ask for Money](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-politely-say-no-when-people-ask-for-money/): Practical scripts and boundaries for refusing money requests without damaging the relationship.
- [How Do You Confront Someone Who Owes You Money Without Ruining the Relationship?](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-do-you-confront-someone-who-owes-you-money-without-ruining-the-relationship/): Advice on asking for repayment clearly while protecting trust.
- [How to Keep Track of Money Between Family Members (Without Damaging the Relationship)](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-keep-track-of-money-between-family-members/): Guide to handling family reimbursements, recurring costs, and clear balances.
- [How to Ask Someone to Pay You Back Without Being Rude](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-ask-someone-to-pay-you-back-without-being-rude/): Polite repayment message examples and timing advice.
- [How to Split Expenses in a Relationship Without Fighting](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-split-expenses-in-a-relationship-without-fighting/): Advice for partners managing uneven shared spending.
- [Why Simple Loans Don't Stay Simple (And Why It's Not Really About the Money)](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/why-simple-loans-dont-stay-simple/): Explanation of why personal loans often become emotionally heavy over time.

## External

- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/you-owe-me-short-term-loans/id1147058670?l=en): Official App Store listing for YouOweMe.
